name: construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously, inefficient scheduling of safety inspections causes compliance issues that can lead to fines. We automate the scheduling and tracking instead of relying on manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem_solved: Difficulty in scheduling and tracking safety inspections leads to compliance issues and potential fines.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in scheduling and tracking safety inspections leads to compliance issues and potential fines.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails
